message:
feat(web): add 'Your First 5 Minutes' section to launch-onboarding

Adds a hand-holding first experience walkthrough with 5 numbered steps:
1. Create a project folder
2. Authenticate Claude (browser opens)
3. Start Claude Code with `cc`
4. First prompt example
5. Expected outcomes

Includes celebration message and mobile-friendly layout.
Resolves bead 96cx.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: FuchsiaHill <agent@acfs.dev>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@ import { useEffect } from "react"; import { PartyPopper, BookOpen, ExternalLink, Sparkles, ArrowRight, GraduationCap, Terminal } from "lucide-react"; import { Card } from "@/components/ui/card"; +import { CommandCard } from "@/components/command-card"; import { markStepComplete, setCompletedSteps, TOTAL_STEPS } from "@/lib/wizardSteps"; import { trackConversion } from "@/lib/analytics"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; @@ -155,6 +156,97 @@ export default function LaunchOnboardingPage() { + {/* Your First 5 Minutes */} + +
+
+ +

Your First 5 Minutes

+
+

+ Let's make sure everything works with a quick test run. +

+
+ +
+
+
+ 1 +
+
+

Create a project folder

+ +
+
+ +
+
+ 2 +
+
+

Authenticate Claude

+ +

+ A browser window will open. Log in with your Anthropic account, + then return to your terminal. +

+
+
+ +
+
+ 3 +
+
+

Start Claude Code

+ +

+ After authenticating, this launches Claude Code. +

+
+
+ +
+
+ 4 +
+
+

Your first prompt

+

+ In the Claude prompt, type: +

+
+ Create a simple Python script that prints "Hello from AI!" and run it +
+
+
+ +
+
+ 5 +
+
+

Watch the magic!

+

+ Claude will: +

+
    +
  • ✓ Create a file called hello.py
    • +
  • ✓ Write the Python code
    • +
  • ✓ Run the script for you
    • +
  • ✓ Show "Hello from AI!" in the output
    • +
+
+
+
+ +
+

+ 🎉 Congratulations! You just used AI to write and run code! +

+
+ + {/* What you can do now */}
